title: Best Water Bottle I’ve Ever Owned
text:
I am very particular about my water bottles. I’ve gone through around a hundred different ones over the past few years, and I have FINALLY found the perfect one.

This water bottle has it all:
1) It holds 32 ounces, which is a pretty good size. Since I have trouble drinking enough water in the day, I thought 32 oz was a good size so all I have to do is drink two a day and I’m set. I’ve been able to do this every day since I’ve owned this water bottle.
2) It has a nice design on it. I got the two tone blue color and it’s beautiful! Finally something functional that’s not bland and ugly.
3) It has a straw! I love that it gives you two top options. I like using the straw better because it’s easier to use and I tend to drink more water when I can use a straw for some reason.
4) It is well made. This bottle is a great size and shape, and it feels very solid. Haven’t had any issues with damage whatsoever, and it does not leak at all.
5) It keeps the water at the right temperature. Even though I only drink room temp water, I love that it still has the option to keep the water hot or cold. I went on a 3 hour hike, and it kept my water still room temp, which was great because it didn’t heat up during the walk so it still tasted cool.

Overall, this is an incredible water bottle and I highly recommend it. I absolutely love it, and it’s perfect in every way.

My only recommendation is to get a bottle and straw brush to aid with cleaning so that you can keep it in great condition.
_gate_reason: The review describes the two-tone blue color and nice design of the bottle.

title: Great Water Bottle and Great Price!
text:
These water bottles are great! I ordered one for me and one for my husband, both 32 oz. They both came with the sports straw cap as indicated, as well as the regular metal, airtight lid. The colors are great and seem to be pretty scratch-resistant. They do not sweat at all. I haven't observed any leaking with the straw closed.
They also hold temperature extremely well! I poured water straight from the fridge in mine yesterday at about 12:00 PM and it's been almost 24 hours and it is still just as cold as when I put it in there! And that is with the straw cap, which is not airtight. Now, that is in indoor, fairly climate-controlled circumstances. My husband, who works in a manufacturing plant that regularly stays between 80 and 100 degrees inside depending on the weather (we live in the humid South, and his plant has an industrial wild-type oven that runs constantly) had his at work had barely-cold (just above room temp) water in his one day with the straw cap and by his lunch break (about 4 hrs later) it was getting warm. We haven't tried ice-cold water in his yet, nor have we attempted the airtight lids.
But overall these water bottles have been great so far after three weeks of use and I am really happy with my purchase. For $24 these are a great option, comparable to Hydro Flask (maybe not as many size options) and YETI bottles, and MUCH cheaper.

(I had this issue with Simply Modern and Iron Flask; both great water bottles in terms of holding temperatures for beverage, etc. but for whatever reason would occasionally slip out of my hand if I didn't have a grip in it) I can casually hold this one (by the bottle, not the lid) and whatever coating they put on the outside prevents it from ever sliding out. I actually find myself buying accessories for it; i.e., cleaning brushes and a carrying handle. I ordered the mandarin color which is pretty, vibrant and true to the website. I love that it comes with two tops although I must admit that so far, I've only used the straw top. Because the 32 oz is pretty large (doesn't fit cupholders), I decided to order an 18 oz that I hope will fit in my handbags and hopefully reduce my bottled water consumption. Buy this bottle, I don't think you will be disappointed. It's the most I'VE ever paid for a water bottle but WAY less than others I've seen out there. No leaks, no condensation-- just an all-around great bottle. I really like this water bottle and if I were not so frugal, I would purchase more in other colors but really-- how many stainless steel water bottles does one person need! LOL

title: Doesn't stay cool, tastes funny!
text:
I've been using this product regularly for about a month now, and so I feel I'm familiar enough with it to give my honest opinion.
To start with, I love the way it looks. Kind of like a rip off Hydroflask for half the price, so no complaints there. I really like that it comes with two separate lids, one a straw lid, and one a normal screw on lid. I prefer the look of the straw lid personally, but I prefer my water bottles to be waterproof, so I don't really use it that often. It doesn't feel cheap; it's quite sturdy and heavy duty feeling. The paint isn't peeling or fading, there's no rust, and there isn't anything visually wrong with the bottle, which can't be said for all water bottles I've owned for over a month.
That said, there are two primary issues that would have prevented me from purchasing the bottle had I known. The first is that there is a weird taste. When I received the bottle, I made sure to clean it out very thoroughly, numerous times, and it had a strange smell to it. Filled it up with my normal tap water, and found that the smell translated into weirdly flavored water. It's not my tap water, because I've never noticed it until I started drinking from this bottle. I've washed this bottle many times in the past month just to be sure I wasn't jumping to conclusions, and the smell and taste are always still there. It's especially potent with the water at the bottom of the bottle, and it's quite unpleasant to deal with.
The second major issue is that the water DOES NOT stay cool for long at all. Initially, I was using the straw lid to test it out, and when the water went from ice cold to room temperature in a couple hours, I figured it was because it didn't have a proper seal. So I switched to the normal lid, and discovered that at longest, my water will stay colder than the room I'm in for about 3 hours. I know how to properly screw on a lid, I don't think I'm at fault here, and I haven't even dropped the bottle a single time. The worst part? The weird taste becomes worse when the water isn't cold, so I have to drink it all very quickly so I don't feel the need to dump it out and refill it again. I really don't understand how a bottle feeling this rugged and high quality can do so bad a job at keeping the water cold, a plastic Dasani bottle could probably do a better job.
In short, I can't recommend that anyone buy this bottle given my personal experience. The weird taste and the utter lack of insulation are enough to turn me off to this bottle completely. It's a good price, but there were many options to choose from at this price point, and I feel I would have been better off spending my money on a different one.
_gate_reason: The review describes the bottle's appearance and materials in detail.

title: Bottle itself is great, lids not so much.
text:
Bottle itself is great. I love the color, no metal taste, no condensation. I can't tell the difference between it and my Hydroflask that cost twice as much, except that the center of the bottom isn't ground as smooth.

The lids, on the other hand, are not as good. The standard lid looks and feels fine, but it is not well insulated. Condensation will form on the outside of the lid, especially if the bottle is lying on its side or top down. So your other stuff might get wet. Also, if it's forming condensation, that means there's more heat transfer between your drink and the outside air. Might matter to you, might not.

The lid with the straw? Absolute garbage. I don't mind it not being insulated, thats just a trade-off for the convenience of a straw. The biggest problem is the mouthpiece doesn't seal against the main part of the lid, so there's an air leak. It's like trying to drink through a broken straw. It will seal if you push it down, but that gets irritating quickly. It did seem to seal in the closed position. I also could not get the mouthpiece to separate from the lid itself, so I can't really see a god way to clean it thoroughly.

The lid also fell off twice from the bottle getting dropped from about 2 feet off the ground. Not dropped hard enough to sent or scratch the bottle. My Hydroflask has been dropped several times from up to 10 ft. It's covered in dents and scratches and the lid has never come off.
_gate_reason: The review describes the bottle's color and smoothness of the bottom.

title: Could be a five
text:
I got one for everyone in my family, but we did have a few issues with Hydro Cell. The goods first- It’s a great portable water storage system. It’s well insulated and keeps water nice and cool provided you follow the enclosed directions- put about 3/4 full of ice and the water stays cool after refills. I give that part a five star. It does condensate on the plastic mouth piece only. My youngest always leaves it on the couch on its side and of course the plastic drinking part is not insulated and when the cold water touches plastic ...it condensate there only. Powder coating and colors are nice and vibrant. Have not used for hot liquids.

We did have some issues with one of our bottles. I got my youngest the 18oz bottle. The bottom of her bottle was cracked. The powder coating was beginning to lift and edges sharp. I noticed it on day 3 since delivery. No worries, Hydro cell’s customer service was right on top of things. Not 5 minutes like other claimed, more like an hour. Regardless, they gave us a coupon for a new bottle. The replacement bottle came, but this one was dented. Once again customer service was on the ball and gave us another coupon. So third times a charm. Point being- customer service is not lacking but quality control may need an overhaul.

The bottles are great, we are happy with them. My family loves them, as do I. However, it was frustrating to deal with the damaged bottles. Give it a try, it’s reasonably priced. A very good value.
_gate_reason: The review describes the powder coating and vibrant colors of the bottles.

title: Awesome Bottle!!

The color is the same as pictured. The straw lid works great. I have had the straw slip off on the inside but no worries, easily slides back on. Has a larger straw part so I find I drink more water without realizing it. That's a win!! The solid lid works well and does not leak. I fill my bottle with ice and water. The water doesn't last very long as I drink it quickly but it does stay cold. The bottle sits on my nightstand and in the morning, there is still ice and the water is cold so that is what I drink to start the day. Does this bottle hold ice for days? I don't think it would but it does keep ice for a good 12-15 hours (as long as it's not 120 degrees). I don't need ice for days but I do for hours so for me, this bottle is the perfect one. Thank you Hydro Cell for checking all my boxes.

title: Looks beautiful but damages easily and doesn’t insulate well
text:
Beautiful bottle and I really want to love it, but on the whole it’s a very average product and there are better ones for the money. Received mine 10 days ago and have been taking it to work every day. 10 days in and the bottom has cracked from average wear and tear, Ive never dropped it just been putting it on my desk at work and bedside table.

The metal top is good (not great) at insulating. But if you’re using it as a water bottle and use the drinking cap, it’s absolute crap at insulating. Just a plastic top that can’t insulate at all. I fill mine completely with ice and a little bit of water, and it always melts without fail by the time I get to work during my 45 min subway commute. I switched to this from a swell bottle which was so insulating that it was actually frustrating if you put ice in it and it would never melt, so to have room temperature water within an hour of filling it was a shock.

The straw I give a 4/5. It’s honestly pretty solid (save for the fact that when using the straw lid it doesn’t insulate). My only complaint is it doesn’t reach the bottom of the bottle so I sometimes find myself sucking air when I can still fee water sloshing around in the bottom. If I were to guess, there’s one straw size for every bottle and when you get the medium / large bottles, the straw isn’t large enough.

It’s not absolute garbage, but I’ve had cheaper bottles function better. It’s saving grace is it’s portability. The lid has a finger loop in it which makes carrying it on the subway super easy and I can hold it with one finger while messing around on my phone with two hands. Probably the only reason I gave it 3 instead of 2 stars.
_gate_reason: The review describes the bottle's appearance and materials, including the metal top.

title: This bottle is everything the expensive ones are
text:
Love this bottle. The color is beautiful, it is sturdy and well made, it works very well with the straw and does not leak.
I highly recommend hydro cell and would buy another without question!
_gate_reason: The review describes the beautiful color and sturdy construction of the bottle.

title: Excellent quality water bottle!
text: The Hydro Cell Water Bottle works great in most any conditions. Keeps your drink cold with the Wide Mouth lid, and is great on the go with the Sport lid. Has a nice texture to it, and stands out with it's simple design. Fits nicely into most any cupholder as well (at least for the Standard size). Would recommend to anyone looking for a new bottle!
_gate_reason: Describes the bottle's texture and simple design.

title: Great water bottle that doesn't sweat
text: I really like this water bottle.  It's great looking and the coating on the outside makes it easy to hold onto and sweat-resistant.  My one complaint would be the lid.  I like the fact that it's attached but it does feel a bit in the way when you are drinking from it.  I don't know what the solution would be except maybe a longer loop, so it's not so close to the bottle, maybe?  Other than that, it is great.  The 24 oz. fits perfectly in my cup holder in the car and my drink stays cold all day.
_gate_reason: The review describes the water bottle's appearance and coating.

title: Love!!!
text: Love this water bottle! We have bought 4 total! The 18 oz are perfect for my boys and the 32 oz is great for myself and my husband! My sons love the colors and that the lid has a handle!
_gate_reason: The review mentions colors and sizes of the water bottles.

title: I don't know why I waited so long to purchase this!
text: I bought the 24 oz wide mouth bottle, and it has helped me up my water intake. I was looking for the perfect water bottle for working out, and this fit the bill. I wanted a straw lid so I could easily drink out of it without having to unscrew anything. The wide mouth makes it super easy to fill up with ice and then add water. I really wish I would have bought this months ago. The powder coating is very nice. I have been pleased by how well the bottle retains the cold temperature event with the straw lid. And I absolutely love that the large 24 oz size fits in my car cup holder and doesn't leak in my gym bag. I am one satisfied customer!
_gate_reason: The review describes the bottle's size, color, and powder coating.

title: Stays Cold!
text: This is a great water bottle.  I have been using it all summer and it has kept my water cold even on the hottest days.  It is easy to clean and fill and doesn't leak or sweat.  It also looks great!
_gate_reason: The review mentions that the water bottle looks great.

title: Stays cold, but leaks
text: Beautiful bottle, holds up well and keeps temperature well but will not keep sealed regardless of top. If the bottle inverts at all it leaks.
_gate_reason: Describes the bottle as beautiful and mentions its appearance.

title: Loving this.
text: Love this bottle. I got the white and black gradient one and I get so many compliments on it. The only thing is it doesn’t fit in my car cup holder but that’s not much of a deal to me at all. Also I broke the sport too and bought a new one and hydro cell had it me in like 3 days. Love this thing.
_gate_reason: Describes the colors and gradient of the bottle.

title: Good quality water bottle
text: Got the blue one. Works well and love the look!
_gate_reason: The review describes the color and appearance of the water bottle.

title: Mixed Bag
text: Love the color of the cup and the two lids. The cup however does not hold ice nearly as well as my old Hydro Flask and it's not even close. If it wasn't for the baller straw lid and fantastic tangerine color I would of sent this back.
_gate_reason: The review describes the cup's color and lid details.

title: Keeps drinks cold but dents and scratches way too easily
text: I LOVE my hydro cells. I have two.  By accident, on the second day I used my newest one, the pink white ombré, my water bottle fell out of my purse while I was bending over to pick up a book of my classroom floor. It didn’t drop from a high height, but it is dented and the paint has come off all the way down one side and is all scratched and black now. :( Seems like it should be better constructed to withstand falling out of a purse near the ground. This one that I just purchased, while beautiful and  keeps my drinks super cold, seems to be more cheaply made than my first one I bought two years ago which has withstood hiking and all sorts of outdoor activities and still looks brand new.
_gate_reason: Describes the pink white ombré color and visible damage on the bottle.

title: Giant water bottle.
text: Bought this for my son, who drinks water all day. Large and sturdy. Nice color.
_gate_reason: Describes the bottle's size and color.

title: Great color selection, good insulation
text:
What can I say...it's a water bottle!

From my usage, it's so far been great. The cap has a tight seal and I've had no issues with leakages. The insulation in this bottle is top notch. It has no issues keeping my water cold all day while I'm working. The color is nice and matches the preview photo pretty well.

Why spend 20% more on a big brand water bottle when this one will do the trick just as well?
_gate_reason: The review mentions a nice color that matches the preview photo.

title: Stays cool and comfortable to take with you!
text: I thought it would be bulky and cumbersome but the handles make it easy to carry all day. I hike with it for a couple hours and my drinks stay icy cold. The grip feel of the paint is great and the color combo is so cute!
_gate_reason: Describes color combo and grip feel of the product.

title: Love it! Does what it should be doing!
text: I love this water bottle or canteen, I’m a door to door salesman and I usually just carry a traditional plastic water bottle in my back pocket, but I got sick of boiling hot water so I wanted something that could still fit in my back pocket and not get in the way, this fits perfect looks great and for a comparison it is slightly larger than a plastic water bottle but it does hold 2 more OZ but the over all is it is awesome, super durable, great price point, no leaks, does it’s job!

title: I love my water bootle!

title: Exactly what I wanted.

Love that it came with the wide mouth lid or the straw and mouthpiece option. I use the straw so it doesnt accidentally spill if I forgot to close. I got the pink and white ombre type color and its bright and happy. Super happy with my purchase. Actually got my boss one too!!
_gate_reason: Describes the pink and white ombre color of the water bottle.

title: Keeping water cool all day.
text:
This bottle keeps water cool for all day and easy to ship. I loved the nice looks for the price.
The only issue was the lid broke after 3-4 time use and it seems that made out of thin plastic the bottom of lid.
_gate_reason: The review mentions the nice looks of the bottle.

title: Great deal
text:
Bought for my kids at school. Awesome. She loves the bright color.

Update:

Sadly adter a few years of use the bottle got mold, but I decided to contact xuatomer service and they work with my issue. Amazing customer service!!!
_gate_reason: The review mentions the bright color of the product.

title: Compares to other name brands for sure, better even in some ways
text: I recently bought a $40 bottle from a competitor with a similar name. Then it was another $10 for the sport top to make it easier to drink out of. Its pretty and it works great, but when both kids wanted one as well, I knew I had to look for a more affordable option. I tried this HydroCell after reading many reviews. I bought the orange and red 24 oz bottle.  It looks exactly as pictured- the gradient is really pretty. The loop top makes it easy to carry, and the straw lid is awesome. But the most important test came on one of the hottest days of the year we've had here. It was at least 90 degrees and even hotter on the turf field. I put in cold tap water, and 3 ice cubes, and took the bottle to a field hockey game with me. It was sitting in the direct sun, opened for the occassional sip, for nearly 2 hours. By the time I got home, it had been 4 hot summer hours since I'd filled it with the tap water and 3 ice cubes. There was still ice in it and the water was still very cold! Now I'm shopping for a few more without hesitation.
_gate_reason: The review describes the colors and gradient of the bottle.

title: The best water bottle period.
text: This is the best water bottle out there! I have a yeti for my coffee but needed a water bottle for my everyday all day use. This was bottle was it. Not only is it sturdy and has a good feel and look to it but it keeps water cold and cool. Cold at first with the ice(few hours)and cool soon after(all day). We go to Disneyland almost every weekend. I wanted a bottle for my wife, daughters and I for the long summer visits. This was it. (40oz) I fill it 1/4 with ice and the rest water in the morning and it will last cool and refreshing up until the next day! No joke! You’ll see. Can’t go wrong with it. All of my family has one and I just ordered another one for myself.
_gate_reason: Describes the bottle's sturdy feel and good look.

title: Bottle seems quality.
text: I purchased 5 of these waterbottles for family members who are traveling into town. They seem like great water bottles but unfortunately one of them sent was the wrong color,  so the sisters who I'd planned on having distinct bottles will end up with the same color.  The neon color scheme looks really cool.  I would have loved to see the orange and red fade as i ordered but they will be here tomorrow and i won't be able to replace the product.  Holding it up next to a yeti it appears to be of nearly identical standard.  The plastic connecting the bottle to the cap seems durable and flexible without being flimsy.
_gate_reason: The review describes the neon color scheme and appearance of the bottles.

title: Comparable to the Hydroflask
text: I am in love with this bottle. I got the black and white ombré and it keeps my water cold and with ice in it. I also liked the way it was packaged with two different lids. Easy way to change out if needed. I have a Hydroflask as well and I would say this is comparable for less than money. Will be ordering more for my daughters
_gate_reason: Describes the black and white ombré color of the bottle.

title: THE BEST WATER BOTTLE
text: I've bought three of these.  So far.  They are amazing and we love them.  The wide, screw top lid is easy to drink from and secure.  The metal construction is solid.  The texturing on the outside is nice.  Everything I want in a water bottle.  Big fan!
_gate_reason: Describes the metal construction and texturing of the water bottle.

title: Good size and quality
text: Bought the 40 oz, I like the color a lot. Good coating, water tastes like it should and the price is great. I don't use it much anymore because I bought a smaller bottle for the car and around the house and a bigger bottle for work. But this bottle is great, first one I bought.
_gate_reason: The review mentions the color and size of the bottle.

title: Great water bottle

title: MUST BUY!!!

title: Keeps ice solid for 18 hours

title: Great bottle, QC for accessories lacking be customer service makes up for it.

The bottle itself is well made, feels nice in your hand, and looks nice on your desk. I've had tea and water in it so far with no flavor crossover between.

The only problem I had is that while the straw-lid is perfect, the standard lid's seal appeared to be loose and would cause the lid to become stuck. Hydro Cell's customer service was quick to rectify the problem and ship me a new one right a way.
_gate_reason: The review describes the bottle's appearance and how it looks on a desk.

title: Love this thing!

I ordered the 18oz which is the perfect size for me when hiking, it's nice and lightweight. I also really like the wide mouth it's much easier to drink from.

title: Love it. As promised.

title: Love it!

title: Just as described

title: Keeps drink super cold!
text: Okay I was skeptical since this bottle was a little cheaper than some of the others.  A lot cheaper than the main brand but honestly works just as well if not better.  I bought the ombre white to pink bottle and it is so vibrant pink!  I put a few ice cubes, water, and my Crystal Light in the morning and by afternoon it's still got ice!  By evening it's still got small pieces of ice and super cold drink.  It works fantastically!  I love it so much.  My daughter has a HydroFlask and paid 3 times the amount and hers doesn't work as well as this one.  I may be buying more soon!
_gate_reason: The review describes the vibrant pink color of the bottle.

title: Awesome bottle!!!
text:
I purchased the 32oz Teal bottle around Christmas last year and didn't use it much until a couple months ago. Shortly after using it the straw lid would leak some while moving during carrying. I contacted the company and they were extremely understanding, cordial and helpful with replacing the lid with no cost to me. SUPER WIN to find a company like this!
As for the product itself, one can't go wrong with this purchase. On a hot summer day a drink will remain ice cold for many hours when kept out of direct sunlight and/or a scorching car. There are better insulated bottles (Rtic for one), but this one preforms very well! The straw lid is easy to use and clean, and the screw cap is solid and secure. Neither one leak (after the replacement) and don't require a death grip in order to tighten them on. The paint finish on the bottle holds up well and lends for a nice gripping surface. Although, I mostly carry my bottle in a bottle bag (the MIRA 32oz water bottle carrier is great with this!). I will definitely purchase a Hydro Cell again when the time comes!
_gate_reason: The review describes the teal color and paint finish of the bottle.

title: Amazing!
text: I got this water bottle (40oz in teal) mainly for work. I wanted something that would hold a decent amount of water as well as keep the water cold. Also, I love the bottle is sweat proof! No more puddles on my desk. When I first got my bottle the sports cap was broken. I was so disappointed. BUT I contacted the seller and within a day they sent me a new sports cap free! BEST CUSTOMER SERVICE! I highly recommend!
_gate_reason: The review describes the water bottle's color and size.

title: Awesome Product!
text: Saw that another bottle type was offered in the Hyro Cell family so of course could not wait to purchase and see how the product stands up to the many others we have and stand by.  Took it to the beach this past weekend and, filled it Saturday morning forgot about it in the car on Sunday and come Monday … ice tea was still ice cold as there were remaining ice cubes left standing in the bottle!  My son was excited over the new tri-color bottles offered, I was excited it is a product that I do not have to worry about refilling and re-icing on those days of summer camps, beach visits, lake trips etc.  LOVE IT
_gate_reason: The review mentions new tri-color bottles offered in the product.

title: Cap Broke after a short time
text: Looks great, works ok. Ice melts after a couple hours or so and now the cap is broken after a week or two of use. It’s like a stripped screw. The cap goes on fine but when it’s time to unscrew it it twists and twists with a horrible scraping sound and won’t come undone unless I yank and push I’m ridiculous ways.
_gate_reason: The review mentions the cap's appearance and its functionality.

title: Keeps drinks cold!
text: I filled this up with ice water and left it in my black car, parked in the sun, for about 6 hours on a 104° day and the ice cube had barely melted at all. Left it in the car overnight and went out the next morning to find that it still had ice cubes in it. I'm really impressed with the quality and color of this bottle. I ordered the 24oz version but now I plan on getting the 40oz too.
_gate_reason: The review mentions the quality and color of the bottle.

title: Keeping it cold!

Kept water (with ice cubes) ice cold from 10:30 am until 2:30 pm outside in 95° weather. That’s impressive.

Doesn’t leak or sweat. Got the green, great color.

Love the wide mouth as it’s easier to clean. I prefer not to use a straw and this was just want I wanted. My only issue is the cap is connected, so sometimes I get smacked in the face while drinking. Otherwise, love love love this!!

title: Amazing Customer Service
text:
This is a great water bottle! Looks just like you-know-who for half the price. I get many compliments and even people asking where I got a hydroflask in that color. Lol!

My straw cap did break a couple of weeks into using it, but when I sent the company an email they apologized and promptly sent a new one in the mail! The new straw cap has held up perfectly, even after lugging it around campus and to the gym daily. Not even a scratch! :)

title: Keeps things cold

title: Best Water Bottle of All Time

title: Awesome Insulated Water Bottle!

title: Great bottle

title: Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours!

title: Just Buy it!
text: I looked through many water bottles on amazon and couldn't decide which one to get. I decided to get the 32oz pink Hydro Cell water bottle and I am so glad I did! I took this water bottle to Colorado to go hiking and it did exactly what I needed- kept my water cold for hours! I filled it with half ice and the rest water, I went for a 5 hour hike in 102 degree weather and the water remained cold, no leaking, no perspiration, and it looked cute! A lot of reviewers commented on the sports cap not working. If that is the reason you are not buying this water bottle then BUY IT. Mine didn't work, so I contacted the company and within 5 hours, I received an email to get a sports cap sent for free to my house. The new sport cap works perfectly. If you happen to get one that doesn't work you can get a brand new one within a few days for free. Instead of spending a lot of money on another water bottle: I would recommend getting this one because it is a reasonable price and works according to the description. The company stands by its products and is very accommodating to make sure you are happy with your purchase. GREAT PURCHASE!
_gate_reason: The review describes the water bottle's color and appearance as cute.

title: Great bottle without breaking the bank
text: First and foremost, the hydro cell bottles come in such beautiful eye popping colors that it’s hard not to buy more than one. They do a great job at keep cold drinks cold throughout the day. I have not tried it with hot drinks, but I’m sure they do a great job as well if you use the stainless steel cap for extra insulation. The customer service is absolutely phenomenal. My sports cap started to leak after a couple months for an unknown reason, I emailed the company and within a couple hours I got a reply that they will be sending me a new sports cap free of charge. For how amazing this bottle performs and the array of colors it comes in, it is definitely the insulated bottle to buy without spending too much money, especially on other brands like hydro flask. Even though the cap started to leak, they still get 5 stars for how amazing their customer service is!
_gate_reason: The review describes beautiful eye-popping colors of the hydro cell bottles.

title: Wonderful Item!!

Needless to say, I was devastated to leave it on the bus and of course, someone took the liberty of taking it home with them. But I will buy another one. This was a great purchase.

title: Fun colors, keeps water cold, comes with two tops and a straw!
text: I love that it comes with two tops - one that screws off, and one that you can flip the thing out and drink from with the straw it comes with!  That is really helpful.  I also love the fun color options!  I also love that it comes in so many sizes - I got 40oz, which will he great for camping at stuff.  And the water stays cold for a really long time!  The only thing I don't love is that it's too big to fit in my bag's pockets or in car doors, etc., but I understand that's just part of the deal when you want a water bottle that holds a lot.
_gate_reason: Describes fun colors and various sizes of the water bottle.

title: All around excellent bottle
text: (32oz) This waterbottle hits all the spots for a perfect waterbottle. Except one(I’ll mention this later, it’s not a big deal). The waterbottle is perfect keeping water icy and keeping me hydrated. In my experimentation I filled the bottle full with ice and water to fill up the rest. The bottle managed to keep ice for well over 24 hours with the sport cap, however, the standard metal cap does leak some coldness and ice usually doesn’t make it to the advertised 24 hours, although I use the metal cap anyway because it looks much better. Anyways I’ve had the the bottle for 2 weeks and have dropped it a few times, so far no dents in the bottle. Another (probably) unintentional feature is the sand blasted or whatever steel keeps sand from sticking, something which annoys me tirelessly with other bottles. With this bottle sand rubs right off, a neat feature of you spend time at the beach or such. The metal cap is very easy to remove with the flexible rubber holder thing. Now to me, the only con is that the bottle doesn’t fit into any cup holder, meaning I usually end up leaving the bottle on the floor next to me, which hasn’t raised an issue yet So far I can’t find any reason to spend another $20 on a Yeti or hydro flask.
_gate_reason: The review describes the bottle's appearance and features like the metal cap and finish.

title: Exactly what I ordered

I carry it in my bag and it's constantly on it's side and it has not leaked once with the sport lid. It comes with two lid types to switch out and I prefer the sport lid without the straw.

title: Works as well OR BETTER than other more expensive bottles!
text:
I was looking for a quality 32oz stainless steel bottle and considered buying another Hydro Flask, as I already own the 16oz size. However, this Hydro Cell bottle was definitely the right choice and the price can't be beat! I bought the 32oz fuschia bottle and couldn't be happier with my purchase!

1. The color is absolutely BEAUTIFUL! The color in the pictures doesn't do it justice. The fuchsia is bright and cheery, but not annoyingly bright. It's perfect. If you like "electric" pink (as the CS rep described it), you will LOVE the color!

2. The bottle holds up VERY well. I've already accidentally banged it against my granite counter top a couple of times, and there's not a dent or scratch on it.

3. I can tell you from experience, it will leave your drink cold for hours and hours. I left on a weekend trip and forgot my bottle at home (whoops) and when I returned over 48 hours later, there was STILL ice in the bottle!

4. While I have not tested the straw lid, the bottle with the screw top lid WILL NOT LEAK! Not even a drop! I've been incredibly pleased with this.

5. Sweat proof! No matter how cold your drink is, this bottle will NOT sweat! Awesome!

6. The 32oz (yes, the BIG, wide bottle) actually FITS in the backseat center console cup holder of my 2017 Nissan Altima! This was a pleasant surprise, as they advertise that these bottles will not fit in standard sized cup holders.

7. And finally, (my favorite thing about Hydro Cell) the customer service cannot be beat. And I don't say that lightly. I inquired about exchanging my straw lid for an additional screw top lid BEFORE I even made the purchase. Customer service representative Jordan bent over backwards to make sure I was mailed a second screw top lid and it arrived the day after my bottle arrived. Jordan also continued to email back and forth with me when I had additional questions or comments about the bottle and the company. What a wonderful experience!

I honestly can't say enough good things about this bottle or about Hydro Cell in general. If you can't decide which brand to buy, BUY THE HYDRO CELL! You will not be disappointed.
_gate_reason: The review describes the beautiful fuchsia color of the bottle.

title: B+
text:
Overall, this is a decent bottle for the price, but I'll start with my biggest gripe-- petty, but it's the principle. The plastic ring that keeps the screwable cap attached to the bottle has broken on 2 of the 3 bottles I purchased. The 3rd hasn't been used much, so I anticipate the same w/ that one. *Disclaimer* I did add one of the paracord handles. I don't think that this had anything to do with the ring breaking, but who knows. Also, I find this lid is also ornery to twist on and off, almost like a threading issue. I am wondering if that will worsen over time.

This is not comparable to YETI as far as durability and ice longevity. I've dropped mine on concrete twice.. it's dented pretty decently, but nothing that effects anything more than appearance. This keeps my water cold all day and far exceeds my double wall plastic bottle. Although it keeps my water cold, I usually find myself adding ice at least once. I've yet to find myself stranded on a desert island without ice cubes, so this is fine for me.

This really just depends on what kind of quality you're looking for. This is a really good product for the money, although I think I will try another brand next time.

title: Great bottle, great price, GREAT customer service!
text:
I bought a 40oz hydro cell bottle about five months ago, mainly for the cap. We own two hydroflask bottles and love them, but I wanted sport caps with straws, and the reviews for the hydroflask ones were terrible. We also had the old style of bottles where the caps are connected, so I would have had to buy an entirely new bottle to get the new cap, and couldn't justify spending the $60+.

For 1/3 of the price, the hydro cell is GREAT. I prefer a metal bottle, and this one has held up well! I've dropped it once on pavement and not much happened besides a tiny dent and some paint chipping where it hit the cement. I have little kids, so it's important to me that the bottle holds up well but also doesn't cost an arm and a leg to replace. The interior straw is great, the mouthpiece is comfortable (the hole is nice and wide so you get a lot of water at once, which I like), and all the parts are easy to clean and sturdily made. The entire design makes it ergonomic and easy to use/transport, which is great for busy people on the go like us. We have an f-150 with convertible cup holders, and it also fits in the largest cup holder size.

I took one star off only because I don't think the insulation is quite as good as a hydroflask. My hydroflask kept ice in my water, in a 80+ degree car in the middle of summer for over 24 hours. The hydro cell doesn't quite do that, but for the most part it keeps my water cooler than room temperature, and again, for the price, that's fine with me. Also, if your bottle tips over and the mouthpiece is in the up/open position, it will spill. I've never had leak problems except for when my kids knock it over, etc.

Normally I'm not good about writing reviews, but I'm really here to applaud their customer service. Two days ago, my 2yo bit a hole though the rubber bite valve on the lid. The hole basically renders it useless. I contacted hydro cell through Amazon and heard back almost right away. All they asked for was my bottle size and shipping address, and they sent me a new sport lid via express mail! It will be here in two more days-- five days (including a weekend) is insanely fast for a replacement part! I was expecting to buy a new lid, and instead they are sending one for free! That's EXCELLENT customer service! I also received a personal email, which I really appreciated. I liked the bottle before this interaction, but their attention to customer satisfaction has sealed me as a hydro cell loyal for life.

If you're debating buying this bottle, I say go for it. For the price, it reliably does what it advertises, and their customer service is second to none. Hoping for more colors in the future so my whole family can own them!
_gate_reason: The review mentions the metal material and ergonomic design of the bottle.

title: amazing - give JR a raise!
text: short back story, I'm only allowed to drink water for health reasons therefore I needed a container I could carry around with me at all times that could hold a nice amount of water. I ordered this one mostly because of the color - it reminds me of a mango lol - and because of the straw feature you can drink with one hand - helps a lot while your driving and your dying of thirst (literary) - unfortunately, by Jan 22, while drinking out of it, it started to have extra air and less water. I was already low on water so I didn't think much of it. the next day, Jan 23, I refilled it and boy did it make a nasty noise! it was 75% air and 25% water. I figured the straw came loose sense I had just refilled it. I opened and nope still there. I closed and tried again. it did it again. so I figured the straw had a hole? I tested the straw by itself and no hole either. I dried the lid and tried again. mind you I only hand wash it and only use it for water and it has not been dropped. At this point I went ahead and contact the seller to see what could be done because I honestly love the bottle and did not what to return it and try to find another because there isn't another (unique color) like this one. I received a response the very same day! the customer service guy was understanding and solved my problem in one email! I not sure if I can say his name but I'll call him JF. His only request was to submit my order# and address on there actual website and they'll send a replacement cap. it took less than 5 min for me to do it. The very NEXT DAY Jan 24, I received an email from JF stating he received my address, he sent out my cap AND provided a tracking#, all in ONE email! I received my cap and a straw - which I didn't expect because I had stated nothing was wrong with the straw but I'm super grateful - on Jan 28, and it works!!! Thank you JF and Hydro!! P.S the original cap completely stopped working by the end of Jan 23. if I put it up to the light, I can see a gummy like stopper - that I am assuming helps - loose and basically explains why it stopped working. I will definitely buy another in the near future because I'm just so obsessed by the color and how sturdy it is and the AMAZING customer service.

title: Straw on Lid May Be Blocked

I haven’t even had my bottle a week yet and I’m already considering buying a couple more so everyone in our house can have their own!

title: Works great!

It is also I terchangeavle for other lids if you want to switch it up.  Its 32 oz which is the perfect size for me. When I put lots if ice and eater it can stat cold and still have a little ice after 2 days. Can even last if I leave it in my hit cat. Come back the next day and still ice cold.  Love it!

title: Well constructed, works great!
text:
This bottle is well constructed and works great at keeping drinks hot or cold. It’s made of double walled, vacuum insulated steel with a nice durable coating (powder coated?). The cap feels very “beefy” and durable, which is nice because I’ve broken caps on other bottles like nalgenes before. I do have to note that the rubber o-ring on the cap arrived displaced, but it was easy enough to press it down into place with a butter knife and it has worked great with no leaks.

I decided to do a little experiment when I first received the bottle. I filled it to the top with ice and checked on it periodically over the next couple days. After 24 hours it was still almost all ice. I only emptied about an ounce of water. After about 40 hours, it was mostly water but I was surprised to still find a little ice left, so the water was still ice cold.

I haven’t tested any hot drinks in it yet, but the ice test showed the bottles insulating properties pretty well.

Overall I’m really impressed with this bottle and expect it to last for quite some time.
_gate_reason: Describes materials and construction details of the bottle.

title: A Purchase Free of Regrets!
text:
While waiting for power to come back after hurricane Irma, this thing has been a Godsend and I am so grateful to have found it! I heard how double steel wall tumblers are supposed to keep beverages cold for a long period of time but I had no idea just how cold and just how long.

The outer shell has a nice matte finish and allows for a better grip. I have been out of the house running errands ALL DAY and leaving the tumbler in the car the WHOLE DAY and it's still cold by the end of the day! Absolutely amazing! You don't need ice, but just a 1/3-1/4 cup of shaved ice gave me the "just out of a fridge" experience every time I opened it.

I've been recommending it to everyone :)
_gate_reason: The review describes the tumbler's matte finish and outer shell.

title: Works well, paint chips off easily.
text: Really like it, keeps the water cold for a full day and doesn't affect the taste. The pant/exterior is really easy to wear off around the edges especially after some use. I have used it for about a week and the edge is already fully chipped off. Works really well overall, only con is the paint quality.
_gate_reason: Describes the paint chipping and exterior appearance of the product.

title: High quality, nice design, keeps water cold and does not sweat
text:
This is one nice-looking bottle. The design feels sturdy, and the teal color was true to the picture. It's a pretty good size-- just enough for a long gym session, or when filled with ice it's a nice add-on to my 3L hydration bladder for a full day outdoor adventure in exposed dry heat. However, the (32 oz) bottle does not fit in a standard cup-holder or bottle cage. The lid design opens and closes smoothly, and the loop when the lid is closed is useful for clipping the bottle to your pack.

Downsides-- the bottle does not keep temperature as well as my (much more expensive) Zojirushi bottle. I filled this bottle with cool tap water and added about 8 ice cubes (the large kind from an icemaker), screwed on the lid, and left it about 18 hours at room temperature. Most of the ice melted, leaving a few very small chips, but the water was still ice-cold. This really doesn't matter for practical purposes, since if I fill the bottle with as much ice as I can, then add water to the top, I'll still have icy cold water after 10 hours in 100 degree weather. Also, it insulates perfectly well for the bottle to not sweat, and the powder coating exterior keeps the bottle easy to grip. I think most of the heat loss is through the plastic lid, and there will be a small amount of condensation there.

All in all, it's a great deal and a much better purchase than the name-brand equivalent.
_gate_reason: Describes the bottle's teal color, size, and powder coating exterior.

The volume is large so I don't have to keep running to the refill station.  The color is a bit matte for me (I prefer things to be shiny) but the black is nice, almost a deep gunmetal.  I always use a ton of ice and this keeps my drinks very cold for a long time.  How long?  I'm not sure cuz I always finish them.  This bottle/thermos is great.

title: Exactly what I want in a water bottle
text: I'm very serious about my water bottles. They have to be 1) durable, as I tend to do a number on my bottles 2) aesthetically appealing 3) LEAK PROOF so I don't ruin my electronics thinking, "Oh, I can totally throw this in my bag." 4) no smaller than 30 oz. I'm a day in, and will update this review if anything changes, but so far, this bottle's perfect. It's super cute, really easy to screw shut tightly, and BONUS, it neither sweats condensation nor lets cool water heat up because of the insulated design. I'm very happy with this purchase. I've consumed 128 oz of water today so far, and the day is not yet done, so my Fitbit is happy with my purchase, too.
